Who We Are

TRUSTED PARTNER
FOR AGRICULTURE

Infra Power System is an authorised distributor of Lauritz Knudsen Electrical & Automation — serving farmers and businesses across India with genuine, high-quality electrical products.

From 0.125 HP single-phase starters to 75 HP IoT-enabled smart controllers, we stock the complete LK agricultural range along with SKN Bentex oil immersed starters.

100% Genuine Products

Authorised LK E&A distributor. Every product is manufacturer-backed with full warranty.

Pan India Delivery

Stocked inventory for popular SKUs. Same-day dispatch available across India.

Expert Technical Support

Help on product selection for your exact pump HP, phase & voltage requirements.

After-Sales Helpline

Dedicated complaint line at 022-6932 7800. We stand by every product we sell.

Government Tender Supplier 🏛️

Proudly served PSU & government tenders — NTPC · ICAR · BHEL and more. Trusted for bulk institutional supply.

INDIA'S AGRICULTURAL BACKBONE

⭐ Spotlight

MU-GS SMART
CONTROLLERS

Control your pump from anywhere in India. The most advanced submersible pump controller on the market today.

Remote ON/OFF from AnywhereSMS, IVRS phone call or mobile App. Works on 2G/3G/4G networks.
Theft Protection AlertInstant alert if anyone tampers with your pump illegally.
11 Regional LanguagesHindi, Kannada, Telugu, Tamil, Marathi, Gujarati, Punjabi & more.
Complete Protection Built-inMCB, dry run, phase failure, locked rotor, voltage unbalance.
6 HP to 75 HP RangeDOL (6–10 HP) and FASD (15–75 HP). North, South & East regions.
View Smart Range Get Quote

Our Promise

"We aren't just exporting an electrical component — we are exporting crop security. Our automatic star-delta controllers ensure that expensive drip irrigation infrastructure is backed by reliable, fail-safe pump protection that can handle erratic power grids."

Infra Power System — Agra, UP

⭐ CUSTOMER VOICES

What Our Customers Say

Real feedback from dealers, farmers and government contractors across Uttar Pradesh who trust Infra Power System for their pump control needs.

★★★★★

"MU-G30 FASD controller पिछले 2 साल से बिना किसी दिक्कत के चल रहा है। Single phasing protection ने हमारा motor कई बार बचाया है। Infra Power System की service भी बहुत अच्छी है।"

RS
Ramveer Singh
Progressive Farmer, Firozabad
★★★★★

"We've been sourcing MK1 and MK2 starters from Infra Power System for our contracting projects for over a year. Genuine LK products, correct MRP billing, and they always have stock — even for less common ratings."

AK
Ashok Kumar Verma
Electrical Contractor, Mathura
★★★★★

"MR-G2 single phase controller लगवाया अपने 5HP submersible पम्प पर। Dry-run protection और dual meter की वजह से टेंशन खत्म हो गई। Price भी market से सही मिला।"

SY
Sunil Yadav
Farmer, Etawah
★★★★★

"As a government empanelled supplier, documentation accuracy matters a lot to us. Infra Power System has never missed a GST invoice or test certificate for LK products supplied on our tenders."

PT
Praveen Tyagi
Procurement Officer, PWD Contractor
★★★★★

"MU-A automatic DOL स्टार्टर से अब रात में उठकर मोटर चालू नहीं करनी पड़ती। M-POWER module से मोबाइल पर ही control हो जाता है। बहुत सुविधा हो गई है।"

MG
Mahesh Chandra Gupta
Farmer, Bah, Agra
★★★★★

"Bought MB and ML starters in bulk for a canal-side pumping project. Fair pricing on volume orders, and the team helped us pick the correct HP rating for each pump instead of just upselling."

VD
Vinod Dixit
Irrigation Contractor, Bharatpur

🔍 HELP ME CHOOSE

सही product 3 सवालों में / Find the right product in 3 steps

आपका pump किस phase का है? / What phase is your pump?
Most agricultural pumps are 3-phase. Check your electricity connection.
⚡
Single Phase
240V — 0.5 to 5 HP
🔌
Three Phase
415V — 3 to 75 HP
Pump कितने HP का है? / What is your pump HP?
यह जानकारी pump nameplate पर लिखी होती है।
आप क्या feature चाहते हैं? / What feature do you need?
अपनी जरूरत के अनुसार चुनें।
